Name: ItemParam
Description: Defines shared parameters related to all items.

Fields.Name: Icon ID
Fields.Description:
The icon to use for this item.
Typically found in menu\tex\icon.

Fields.Name: SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: The SpEffect script to use for this item.

Fields.Name: SFX ID [1]
Fields.Description: A SFX that occurs on use.

Fields.Name: SFX ID [2]
Fields.Description: A SFX that occurs on use.

Fields.Name: SFX ID [3]
Fields.Description: A SFX that occurs on use.

Fields.Name: Weapon ID
Fields.Description: Which weapon this item is linked to.

Fields.Name: Armor ID
Fields.Description: Which armor piece this item is linked to.

Fields.Name: Ammo ID
Fields.Description: Which ammunition this item is linked to.

Fields.Name: Ring ID
Fields.Description: Which ring this item is linked to.

Fields.Name: Spell ID
Fields.Description: Which spell this item is linked to.

Fields.Name: Gesture ID
Fields.Description: Which gesture this item is linked to.

Fields.Name: Sort ID
Fields.Description: Where the item appears in the inventory view. 0 is the top.

Fields.Name: Base Price
Fields.Description:
Price to purchase the item from a vendor.
Per-merchant pricing can be altered with ShopLineupParam.

Fields.Name: Sell Price
Fields.Description: Souls given when sold to Gavlan.

Fields.Name: Animation Speed
Fields.Description: For usable items or weapons, the speed at which the item is used.

Fields.Name: Item Type ID
Fields.Description: Item Type parameters to use.

Fields.Name: Item Usage ID
Fields.Description: Item Usage parameters to use.

Fields.Name: Max Held
Fields.Description: Maximum number that can be held at any one time.

Fields.Name: SpEffect Context
Fields.Description: The context in which the SpEffect is applied.

Fields.Name: Item SpEffect Type [1]
Fields.Description: Relates to SpEffect, 1 is instant effects, 2 is 'persistent' effects.
